nodes.name: 西伯利亚
nodes.summary: 西伯利亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联73种鸟类，包括红胸黑雁、雪雁、凍原豆雁等73种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.target: loc-國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄-ddaff039
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: This owl is not believed to meet the IUCN Red List criterion of declining more than 30% in ten years or three generations and is therefore evaluated as being of least concern. In the UK it is on the RSPB Amber List of Concern. This species has expanded its range in Belgium, the Netherlands, Norway and Ukraine, and populations are stable or increasing in most European countries
